documentation: This COMPILER-SPECIFIC Intel® oneAPI OpenCL* Runtime package contains the compiler-specific shared libraries needed to deploy executables to hosts without the Intel® oneAPI development Toolkits. In addition to this package you will need both the COMMON LIBRARIES and COMMON LICENSING packages.
